svg.text: AV Telemetry Analytics — Real-Time Data Pipeline Architecture
Topic-per-Sensor · Idempotent Producers · 3× Replication · lz4 · Batch Commit Consumers
Spark Structured Streaming · 10s trigger · watermark 1 min
KPI tiles · Hard Braking · Fleet Throughput · 5–60 s auto-refresh · Vehicle focus filter
Infrastructure: AWS EMR 7.0 (Spark 3.5) · S3 · DynamoDB · VPC + NAT Gateway · Auto-scaling Task Group (1–10 nodes) · Terraform 1.7 · GitHub Actions CI/CD · Python 3.11
